mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID AS USER_ID, U.USER_NO AS USER_NO, U.NAME AS NAME, U.EMAIL AS EMAIL, U.ADDRESS_MAIN AS ADDRESS_MAIN, U.ADDRESS_SUB AS ADDRESS_SUB, U.ACTIVE_YN AS ACTIVE_YN, U.CREATED_AT AS CREATED_AT, U.GENDER_FLAG AS GENDER_FLAG, U.PHONE_NUMBER AS PHONE_NUMBER FROM JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY U.USER_NO

SELECT U.USER_ID AS USER_ID, U.USER_NO AS USER_NO, U.NAME AS NAME, U.EMAIL AS EMAIL, U.ADDRESS_MAIN AS ADDRESS_MAIN, U.ADDRESS_SUB AS ADDRESS_SUB, U.ACTIVE_YN AS ACTIVE_YN, U.CREATED_AT AS CREATED_AT, U.GENDER_FLAG AS GENDER_FLAG, U.PHONE_NUMBER AS PHONE_NUMBER FROM JPAS_TB_USER U WHERE 1=1 AND U.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY E.USER_NO
